title: TTT Cobblemon
description:
Catch Cobblemon, Build with Chipped or Eat Human Flesh.
You can do it all and more!
body:
This is a Custom Cobblemon Modpack for The Terrifying Temmies and anyone who wants to use it themselves.

This modpack was based around the Cobblemon mod and with some other mods like the Farmer's Delight and Chipped to make sure you can build anything you want!

The modpack adds: The Cobblemon Mod, Chipped, Farmer's Delight, Tectonic World Generation, Guns and More!

I personally made this modpack for the people who want something which isnt only Cobblemon but also doesn't add HUGE other things.

Feel free to look into the config and change anything you'd like!
